prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
辽宁省2026年高考总人数约20万（仅总人 数），按历史比例估算物理类约14.4万人，与2025年14.34万人基本持平；土木工程、护理学等专业社会热度分化，临床医学热度较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 40288 → 47926 → 42707 → 41803 → 76739 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, they fluctuated between 40288 and 47926, but in 2025, they plummeted to 76739 (the worst in history), mainly due to the expansion to 14 students that year and the addition of low-scoring majors such as Civil Engineering, which dragged down the overall ranking. The average over the past 4 years is about 43181, and the deviation from the average in 2025 is about 33558. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 4 → 7 → 4 → 6 → 14 students, with a significant expansion to 14 students in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 13 students, a reduction of 1 student (about 7.14%) compared to 2025. The reduction is relatively small, so competition is expected to intensify slightly, and the ranking will likely move forward slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 195th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2025), placing it in the middle-to-late segment of 211 universities. The university is located in Lhasa, Tibet, and its remote geographical location is an important factor affecting willingness to apply. In recent years, there have been no significant reputation or public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 30th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms but average popularity. No record of cutoff line breaks or anomalies has been observed, and the overall application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness. Although majors such as Clinical Medicine and Physics (Teacher Training) have certain social demands, they are not top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text:
The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000 (total number only). Based on historical proportions, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 144,000 candidates, roughly the same as the 143,400 in 2025. The social popularity of majors such as Civil Engineering and Nursing is polarized, while Clinical Medicine is relatively popular.
7. [Geographical Factors] Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Liaoning Province, and the willingness to study across provinces is affected by regional preferences. However, its 211 status still attracts some Liaoning candidates with mid-range scores.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal backward shift in rankings in 2025 (due to expansion to 14 students and addition of low-scoring majors), the slight reduction to 13 students in 2026, the stable number of candidates, and the stable reputation, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will move forward slightly compared to 2025. Combined with the trend of slightly intensified competition after the reduction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 73402, with a range of 72902 to 73902.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine
- Physics (Teacher Training) (Mathematics score of 90 or above).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Tibet University will recruit 6 majors with a total of 13 students in the Physics Category in Liaoning Province. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 72902–73902 should focus on Tier 2 majors as their main direction. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<72902) can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Clinical Medicine. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>73902) are advised to use Tier 3 Civil Engineering as a safety option. Clinical Medicine and Physics (Teacher Training) are relatively competitive majors at this university in the Physics Category and are worth prioritizing.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 8477 → 8927 → 9313 → 8687 → 6368 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 8477 and 9313, but in 2025, they surged to 6368 (the best in history), mainly due to only 1 student being admitted that year, causing an abnormal increase. The average over the past 4 years is about 8851, and the 2025 ranking deviates from the average by about 2500. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category were 4 → 3 → 6 → 2 → 1, showing a clear decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is restored to 2 students, a 100% increase compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, expected to greatly ease competition and cause a substantial drop in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 195th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2025), placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 institutions. The university is located in Lhasa, Tibet, and its remote geographical location is an important factor affecting willingness to apply. In recent years, there have been no significant reputation incidents; its Douyin popularity ranks 30th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms but generally moderate popularity. No abnormal drops or records in admission cutoffs have been observed, and overall application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness and limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is approximately 200,000, with an estimated 56,000 in the History Category based on historical proportions, roughly the same as the 56,300 in 2025. In terms of major popularity, social sciences majors like Administrative Management have stable social demand. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Liaoning Province, and cross-province enrollment willingness is influenced by regional preferences, so Liaoning candidates' enthusiasm for applying to this university is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal rise in 2025 rankings (only 1 student admitted), the expansion to 2 students in 2026 (100% increase), stable candidate numbers, and stable reputation, it is expected that the 2026 rankings will drop significantly to near the 2021–2024 average. Combined with the easing of competition after expansion, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10139, with a range of 9639–10639.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 9639–10639 may consider applying; those with rankings better than the lower limit (<9639) have a higher probability of admission. Since there is only one major, there is no tiered strategy of 'reach, match, safety'. It is recommended to make a comprehensive judgment based on personal interest and regional acceptance.
